items.caption: A screenshot of a video editing software interface, specifically adobe premiere pro cc. the interface is open on a mac, as indicated by the dock visible at the bottom of the screen. the main window of the software displays a timeline with various clips and transitions, including a video clip of a woman with red hair, a title card with the text "my title," and a sequence of clips labeled "seg 1 - my first project." the timeline also shows audio clips and transitions, with a focus on the audio waveform and the transition effects. the user interface elements suggest the software is being used for video editing, with tools for adding titles, adjusting audio, and managing clips. the overall style of the image is instructional, likely intended to demonstrate the software's features for a tutorial or educational purpose.
